title: Kronos Research - REKT
relevance_summary: API key unauthorized access leading to large-scale fund draining

prevention.rule: Block any tx that accesses API keys from known vulnerable addresses

vulnerable_contracts: Kronos Research accounts across ETH and BSC
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that accesses API keys from known vulnerable addresses
summary: Kronos Research lost $26M due to unauthorized access of API keys, leading to large-scale fund draining. A guard could have blocked transactions accessing API keys from known vulnerable addresses.
